7:00/**7:07 PM ET** | [Victory+](https://victoryplus.com/)| : {tbl-colwidths="[66,66,80,80]"} ### FAQs **What is NWSL+?** - NWSL+ is a digital streaming service that gives fans access to live NWSL games, match recaps, and highlights. It's a free service available online, and on the NWSL+ app on Apple TV, Fire TV, and Roku. Learn more [here](https://www.nwslsoccer.com/plus). **What is Victory+?** - Victory+ is the newest streaming partner of the NWSL. It's a free streaming service that allows for live game streaming and on-demand sports entertainment for free across major platforms. Access it [here](https://victoryplus.com/). - More information can also be found on the [National Women's Soccer League's Victory+ FAQ site](https://www.nwslsoccer.com/news/victory-faq-everything-nwsl-fans-need-to-know-about-the-free-streaming-platform). This site was created by Arianna D. Cascone. If you notice any issues, please feel free to send me an email or file an issue on GitHub using the buttons below! {{< pagebreak >}} ```{=html} ```
